name: PairCorrectly
description: Step 12.0 baseline — matched-pair round-robin. Every archetype paired with its designed bot: bulwark-control+fortress, ember-aggro+hellfire, hollow-disruption+reaper, tide-thorn-combo+wavebreaker. Cross-pair only (no mirror) so cells are about matched-pair-A vs matched-pair-B, not self-variance. logLevel=llm so the JSONL learning log lands under logs/tournaments/.

text: Tournament 'PairCorrectly' ran 240 games across 6 matchup(s). Pairs: BulFort=(deck:bulwark-control,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-fortress), EmbHell=(deck:ember-aggro,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire), HolReap=(deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper), TiThWave=(deck:tide-thorn-combo,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker)

Matchup BulFort vs EmbHell: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'ember-aggro' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire'. BulFort won 1/40 (BWins:0,Draws:39, 2%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-fortress, bulwark-control) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 420 steps.

Matchup BulFort vs HolReap: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'hollow-disruption' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper'. BulFort won 14/40 (BWins:2,Draws:24, 35%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-fortress, bulwark-control) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 292 steps.

Matchup BulFort vs TiThWave: deck 'bulwark-control' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-fortress' versus deck 'tide-thorn-combo' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker'. TiThWave won 3/40 (AWins:1,Draws:36, A side 2%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker, tide-thorn-combo) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 403 steps.

Matchup EmbHell vs HolReap: deck 'ember-aggro' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire' versus deck 'hollow-disruption' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper'. EmbHell won 7/40 (BWins:1,Draws:32, 18%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire, ember-aggro) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 370 steps.

Matchup EmbHell vs TiThWave: deck 'ember-aggro' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-hellfire' versus deck 'tide-thorn-combo' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker'. TiThWave won 2/40 (AWins:0,Draws:38, A side 0%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker, tide-thorn-combo) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 428 steps.

Matchup HolReap vs TiThWave: deck 'hollow-disruption' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-reaper' versus deck 'tide-thorn-combo' piloted by 'experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker'. TiThWave won 13/40 (AWins:0,Draws:27, A side 0%). Different deck + bot: the (experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker, tide-thorn-combo) pair wins — hard to attribute to either axis alone; follow up with a controlled same-bot or same-deck matchup to isolate. Average game length: 332 steps.

Across all matchups, 'TiThWave' (deck:tide-thorn-combo,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-wavebreaker) outperformed 'HolReap' (deck:hollow-disruption,bot:experimental/2026-04-19-reaper). Pattern: the top pair's bot profile is worth studying as a candidate to pair with similar decks; the weakest pair suggests either a weight-table mismatch or a deck that disagrees with the bot's scoring priorities.
Observation: Close race: 'TiThWave' edges out runner-up by 2 points — consider more games per matchup.
Observation: 6 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.

LEARNING HINT: When choosing a bot for a new deck, prefer profiles whose matched decks in this tournament share archetype tags (aggro/control/midrange) with the new deck. Avoid pairing a utility bot tuned for defence with an aggro deck — it will underweight tempo plays.

Notes: Close race: 'TiThWave' edges out runner-up by 2 points — consider more games per matchup.
6 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.
